item.title: findash 1.2.1
item.description:
• Chart: pick a custom color when adding any indicator (SMA, EMA, Bollinger Bands, VWAP, Volume, RSI, MACD), instead of only an auto-assigned one.
  • Chart: each indicator chip now has a small × button for one-click removal — previously only available via the right-click menu.

item.title: findash 1.2.0
item.description:
• Press F5 to force-refresh every live feed at once — quotes, charts, news, financials — with status-bar feedback.
  • Financials: open the company's SEC filings (EDGAR, matched to Annual/Quarterly) or Yahoo Finance; download the displayed statement as a styled Excel workbook or clean CSV; copy it to the clipboard.
  • Chart: candlestick, OHLC bar, line, and area styles; add/remove/recolor indicators (SMA, EMA, Bollinger Bands, VWAP, MACD, RSI, volume); custom colors for candles, line, grid, and background.
  • Chart: pick range and candle interval independently — including a custom date range — with invalid combinations greyed out and explained; export the chart as PNG; everything persists with your layout.
  • The app now launches maximized; volume axis shows compact figures (150M, 2.5B); fixed clipped range/interval button labels.

item.title: findash 1.1.0
item.description:
• Connect API keys in-app: new APIs menu shows each data source's connection status and opens a connect dialog — free-key links included, no .env editing needed. Keys apply immediately, no restart.
  • First launch of a new install or update now offers a one-time setup prompt when no keys are connected yet.
  • As always, everything keeps working with no keys — free keyless sources remain the default.

item.title: findash 1.0.3
item.description:
• News: headlines now come from major publisher feeds first (Bloomberg, WSJ, MarketWatch, CNBC, and more) — fresher and broader than before, with the previous sources kept as fallback.
  • News: the feed is now sorted — headlines mentioning your active symbol rise to the top, newest first within each group.
  • Quotes: optional Finnhub / Twelve Data sources via FINNHUB_API_KEY / TWELVEDATA_API_KEY in .env; without keys, quotes work exactly as before.

item.title: findash 1.0.2
item.description: • Fix: the app now reopens correctly after an auto-update (the post-update relaunch waits for files to settle).

item.title: findash 1.0.1
item.description: • Share layouts with others: export a saved layout to a .findashlayout file, and import files straight into your saved layouts (Layout menu).
